# Let's try to open the text file in the expected path.
paths = [
    "/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt",
    "/mnt/data/file-14qxJb9hksVuhneP1HgUrz-text_to_analyse.txt",
    "text_to_analyse.txt"
]
content = None
for p in paths:
    try:
        with open(p, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            content = f.read()
            path_used = p
            break
    except FileNotFoundError:
        continue

path_used, content[:2000] if content else None, len(content) if content else None

import re

raw = content

# Find indexes of all double quotes
quote_positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'"', raw)]
pairs = []
# Pair them sequentially (assuming they come in pairs)
for i in range(0, len(quote_positions), 2):
    if i+1 < len(quote_positions):
        start_quote = quote_positions[i]
        end_quote = quote_positions[i+1]
        inner_start = start_quote + 1
        inner_end = end_quote  # exclusive
        span = raw[inner_start:inner_end]
        pairs.append((inner_start, inner_end, span))
len(pairs), pairs[:2]

for i, (s,e,span,typ,left_ctx,right_ctx,a,h) in enumerate(classified, 1):
    print(f"{i}. [{s},{e}), type={typ}")
    print("Left context:", left_ctx[-80:].replace("\n","\\n"))
    print("Span:", span[:80], "...")
    print("Right context:", right_ctx[:80].replace("\n","\\n"))
    print("-"*80)

# Build the final JSON structure
citations = []
for s,e,span,typ,_,_,_,_ in classified:
    citations.append({
        "span_start": s,
        "span_end": e,
        "span_text": span,
        "citation_type": "Aya" if typ=="Aya" else "Hadeeth"
    })
import json, textwrap, pprint
json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False)[:500]

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":161,"span_end":231,"span_text":"وَمَن يُشَاقِقِ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ شَدِيدُ الْعِقَابِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":361,"span_end":454,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلًا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِنْهُمْ مَنْ كَفَرَ وَجَاءَ بِالْحَقِ وَجَاءَ بِهِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":606,"span_end":679,"span_text":"لا يُحِبُّ المُؤْمِنُ لِأَخِيهِ الْمُؤْمِنِ فِعلَ مُحَمَدٍ وَلا خِلَافَهُ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":821,"span_end":964,"span_text":"لا تُؤَمِّلوا الْمُؤَمِّلَاتِ وَلا تُحِبُّوا الْمُحِبَّاتِ وَلا تَكُفُّوا الْمُكَفِّفَاتِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1103,"span_end":1151,"span_text":"لا يُضُرُّكُمُ شَيءٌ حَتّى تُضَرُّوا أَنفُسَكُمْ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1293,"span_end":1413,"span_text":"وَالَّذِينَ جَاؤُوا مِن بَعْدِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَزَيِّنَ وَجْهَنَا لِلْيَوْمِ الْأَخِرِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1554,"span_end":1607,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1746,"span_end":1799,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1938,"span_end":1991,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":2130,"span_end":2183,"span_text":"وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذينَ يُحِبُّونَ مُحَمَدًا","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
